cooked: @conduition Sorry, I don’t understand the concern. I am merely stating the fact that you need to store state for each keypair you derive from the seed. To clarify, “similar to BIP-32” was just referring to the general pattern of deriving multiple keys from a single seed, not claiming compatibility with unhardened derivation.
